instructions.name: create_tranche_state
docs: Creates a tranche state with dynamic leverage configuration.
The junior share token mint should be created externally and its
authority transferred to the tranche state PDA.
# Dynamic Leverage Formula
leverage = base + max(0, target% - junior%) × slope / 10000

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: The junior tranche share token mint (created externally).
Its decimals are stored as share_price_decimals and must match the bank mint.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: Escrow ATA for staked bank mint tokens, owned by the tranche state PDA

accounts.name: locked_junior_shares_ata
docs: Locked shares ATA for junior share tokens pending unstake, owned by the tranche state PDA

instructions.name: fulfill_unstake_junior
docs: Fulfills a pending withdrawal queue entry, redeeming junior shares for
bank mint tokens. Can be called by the owner (anytime) or the
WITHDRAWAL_QUEUE_FULFILLER (only after lockup). Fee depends on lockup status:
- Before lockup: early_unstake_fee_bps (stays in junior pool)
- After lockup: standard_unstake_fee_bps (protocol revenue)

accounts.name: signer
docs: The signer — must be the queue owner or the WITHDRAWAL_QUEUE_FULFILLER.
If fulfiller, the lockup period must have expired.

accounts.name: queue_payer
docs: The account that originally funded the withdrawal queue rent.
Receives the rent refund when the queue is closed.

accounts.name: withdrawal_queue
docs: The withdrawal queue entry. Validated by program ownership (AccountLoader)
and field constraints against bank_state and owner_bank_mint_ata.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: The junior tranche share token mint

accounts.name: owner_bank_mint_ata
docs: Owner's bank mint ATA to receive redeemed tokens.
Authority must match the withdrawal queue owner.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: The escrow ATA for staked bank mint tokens, owned by the tranche state PDA

accounts.name: locked_junior_shares_ata
docs: Locked junior shares ATA owned by the tranche state PDA

instructions.name: instant_unstake_junior
docs: Instantly unstakes junior shares in a single transaction without
creating a withdrawal queue. The early_unstake_fee_bps is always applied.

accounts.name: target_mint
docs: supported yielding mint. Validated during fulfillment.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: The junior tranche share token mint

accounts.name: user_junior_mint_ata
docs: User's junior share token ATA (shares transferred out)

accounts.name: owner_bank_mint_ata
docs: Owner's bank mint ATA to receive redeemed tokens.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: The escrow ATA for staked bank mint tokens, owned by the tranche state PDA

accounts.name: locked_junior_shares_ata
docs: Locked junior shares ATA owned by the tranche state PDA

instructions.name: request_unstake_junior
docs: Requests an unstake of junior share tokens. Transfers shares to a locked
ATA where they continue earning yield during the lockup period.

accounts.name: payer
docs: The account funding rent for the withdrawal queue PDA.
Receives the rent refund when the queue is closed upon fulfillment.

accounts.name: bank_mint
docs: The bank mint (e.g. USD*)

accounts.name: target_mint
docs: supported yielding mint. Validated at fulfillment time.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: The junior tranche share token mint (escrow mint)

accounts.name: user_junior_mint_ata
docs: User's junior share token ATA (tokens will be transferred out)

accounts.name: locked_junior_shares_ata
docs: Locked shares ATA owned by the tranche state PDA.

instructions.name: stake_junior
docs: Stakes bank mint tokens to the junior tranche and receives junior share tokens.

accounts.name: junior_mint
docs: The junior tranche share token mint (PDA owned by tranche state)

accounts.name: user_junior_mint_ata
docs: User's ATA for receiving junior share tokens

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: The escrow ATA for staked bank mint tokens, owned by the tranche state PDA

instructions.name: update_tranche_config
docs: Updates the tranche configuration parameters.

accounts.name: tranche_state
docs: Optional: TrancheState account for banks with tranching enabled.
When junior tranche is active (`shares > 0`), junior escrow and bank token program are required.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: Optional: Junior escrow ATA holding bank mint tokens for the junior tranche.
Required when tranche_state is provided to enable escrow rebalancing.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for the bank mint.
Required when tranche_state is provided to enable escrow rebalancing.

accounts.name: tranche_state
docs: Optional: TrancheState account for banks with tranching enabled.
When junior tranche is active (`shares > 0`), junior escrow and bank token program are required.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: Optional: Junior escrow ATA holding bank mint tokens for the junior tranche.
Required when tranche_state is provided to enable escrow rebalancing.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for the bank mint.
Required when tranche_state is provided to enable escrow rebalancing.

accounts.name: manager_ta
docs: The manager's token account for the destination mint (source of tokens to deposit)

instructions.name: withdraw_tranche_fees
docs: Withdraws accrued protocol fees from the junior tranche escrow.
Only callable by the bank creator or manager.

accounts.name: junior_escrow_ata
docs: The junior escrow ATA holding staked tokens + accrued fees

accounts.name: destination_ata
docs: Destination for withdrawn fee tokens

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: You are not authorized to perform this action.

errors.name: LocalSignificantPriceChange
errors.msg: Price change is too large locally

errors.name: InvalidMarginFiAccount
errors.msg: Invalid MarginFi account - must be correct PDA for this vault

errors.name: OracleUpdateOnEmptyReserve
errors.msg: Unable to push oracle update on an empty vault reserve

errors.name: TranchingNotEnabled
errors.msg: Tranching is not enabled for this bank

errors.name: InvalidLeverageFactor
errors.msg: Invalid leverage factor - must be at least 10000 (1x)

errors.name: WithdrawalQueueNotExpired
errors.msg: Withdrawal queue lockup period has not expired

errors.name: InvalidWithdrawalQueue
errors.msg: Withdrawal queue entry is not in a valid state

errors.name: InvalidAccount
errors.msg: Account does not belong to the expected parent

errors.name: TrancheWipedOut
errors.msg: Junior tranche is wiped out and cannot accept new stakes

errors.name: VaultLossNotAccepted
errors.msg: Vault does not accept losses — enable losses_accepted before retrying

fields.name: unstake_fees
docs: Accumulated unstake fees (bank mint tokens) from standard withdrawal fulfillments

fields.name: shares
docs: Total share tokens currently in circulation

fields.name: staked_amount
docs: Total bank mint tokens actively staked in the tranche

fields.name: virtual_value
docs: Tranche's current share of TVL (in normalized base units, 6 decimals)
This tracks gains/losses for stakers

fields.name: cumulative_loss_absorbed
docs: Cumulative losses absorbed by the tranche (in normalized base units)

fields.name: last_update_ts
docs: Timestamp of last accounting update

fields.name: share_price
docs: Price per share token in normalized base units (6 decimals).
Updated after every yield/loss distribution, stake, and unstake.

fields.name: protocol_fees_accrued
docs: Unclaimed protocol fees (in bank mint tokens) sitting in the junior escrow.
Incremented on standard-path unstakes, decremented when withdrawn by admin.

fields.name: has_reached_recovery_threshold
docs: Set to 1 the first time the junior staked % reaches or exceeds
`recovery_threshold_bps`. Used to switch from `bootstrap_recovery_yield_bps`
to the full `recovery_yield_bps`. Never reset after being set.

fields.name: mint
docs: The bank mint (senior token)

fields.name: share_price_decimals
docs: Decimals for share price (derived from share mint decimals, must match bank mint)

fields.name: base_leverage_factor
docs: Base leverage factor with 2 decimal places (100 = 1.00x, 200 = 2.00x, 215 = 2.15x).
This is the minimum leverage when junior staked % >= target threshold.

fields.name: leverage_slope
docs: Slope for dynamic leverage increase with 2 decimal places (100 = 1, 400 = 4).
leverage = base + max(0, target% - junior%) × slope / 10000

fields.name: target_percent_staked_bps
docs: Target junior staked percentage in basis points (e.g., 2500 = 25%)
Below this threshold, leverage increases dynamically

fields.name: early_unstake_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged for early unstaking (instant liquidity) in basis points
(e.g., 500 = 5%). Fee remains in junior pool, rewarding remaining stakers.

fields.name: standard_unstake_fee_bps
docs: Fee charged for standard unstaking (after lockup expires) in basis points
(e.g., 50 = 0.5%). This is protocol revenue, not redistributed to stakers.

fields.name: low_stake_threshold_bps
docs: When junior staked % is below this threshold (bps), the elevated
`low_stake_fee_bps` is charged on early/instant unstakes instead of the
normal `early_unstake_fee_bps`. Standard unstakes always use
`standard_unstake_fee_bps`. Set to 0 to disable.

fields.name: low_stake_fee_bps
docs: Elevated early unstake fee (bps) applied when junior staked % < low_stake_threshold_bps.
Only applies to early/instant unstakes, not standard unstakes.

fields.name: target_lockup_duration_secs
docs: Target lockup duration in seconds. Users requesting unstake must wait this
duration before an admin can fulfill the redemption. Users can expedite
by paying the early_unstake_fee_bps. 0 means no lockup.

fields.name: recovery_yield_bps
docs: Maximum recovery yield (bps) directed to junior during wipeout recovery
(after the threshold was previously reached). The effective rate scales
proportionally: `recovery_yield_bps * min(junior%, threshold) / threshold`.
Used as a floor via max(recovery_yield, leverage_yield).
Set to 0 to disable recovery (wipeout is permanent).

fields.name: recovery_threshold_bps
docs: Junior % of TVL (bps) above which recovery allocation stops and only the
normal leverage formula applies. Also the denominator for proportional
scaling. E.g. 500 = 5%. Set to 0 for flat rate (no proportional scaling).

fields.name: bootstrap_recovery_yield_bps
docs: Lower maximum recovery yield (bps) used during the initial bootstrap
phase, i.e. before the junior stake % has ever reached
`recovery_threshold_bps`. Subject to the same proportional scaling as
`recovery_yield_bps`. Once the threshold is first crossed, the full rate
takes over automatically. Set to 0 to use `recovery_yield_bps` always.

fields.name: low_stake_fee_enabled
docs: When true (non-zero), the low-stake elevated fee logic is active.
Disabled on tranche creation so early junior depositors are not penalised.

fields.name: losses_accepted
docs: When false, oracle updates that would lower the vault's TVL are rejected.
Must be explicitly enabled before a loss-bearing update can proceed.

fields.name: queue_id
docs: Unique queue ID (u8, per user per bank) allowing up to 256 pending withdrawals

fields.name: owner
docs: The user who owns this queue entry

fields.name: bank
docs: The bank this queue entry is associated with

fields.name: escrow_mint
docs: The mint of the token locked in this queue (e.g. junior tranche share token)

fields.name: target_mint
docs: The mint of the token the user will receive upon fulfillment (e.g. USD*)

fields.name: payer
docs: The account that funded the rent for this queue entry.
Receives the rent refund when the queue is closed upon fulfillment.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount locked in this queue entry (e.g. junior share tokens)

fields.name: request_ts
docs: Timestamp when the withdrawal was requested

fields.name: expiry_ts
docs: Timestamp when the lockup expires and the withdrawal can be fulfilled
